title: Long Tasks, Compaction, Steering, and Handoffs · Contract Clinic: Checkpointing
summary: Keep a multi-hour repository task coherent across context changes and user steering. Planned artifact: Add and verify the prompt checkpointing increment in a durable task state and handoff record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Checkpoint at verified boundaries with rerunnable commands and safe restart instructions.
Distinguish messages that change the active run from follow-up work that should wait.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Build Checkpointing evidence
